notes: consolidated brand surface — hand-authored from BRAND.md
logo at assets/logo.svg is a placeholder; final logo arrives from Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview generation
palette is 7 brand tokens; signal-strong classification (≥3 distinct tokens, 3 type families captured)

site.name: High Lonesome
site.tagline: Bottled bluegrass. One voice in a wide place.
site.intent: Single-maker WNC mountain-spirits house · Sadie Greene · Hot Springs, Madison Co. NC

logo.synthesizedBasis: BRAND.md logo direction — italic Playfair Display 'High Lonesome' wordmark, mountain-silhouette underline + small italic 'bottled bluegrass' tagline beneath
logo.pendingExternalGen: Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview — see brand/BRAND.md logo direction

palette.name: butterfly-pea
usedAs: single-glance light accent on dark grounds

display.role: italic-classical-serif at scale; mixed-case; reads as singing

body.role: humanist serif for long-form reading; roman primary with italic emphasis

anchorPhrases: One voice in a wide place.
I sing while I work. I think it goes in.
The labels are loud because I like them loud.
voice.tensionMove: auditory solitude × visual joy — quiet single-voice mountain music wrapped in saturated Italian-pop palette

imageryLanes.description: atmospheric photographs at dusk/dawn/mist/storm; mountain silhouettes; the gaps and balds; saturated skies (sunrise-pink, blue-hour navy, storm-steel) that justify the saturated palette overlaid
fiddle on windowsill; hand-bound notebook open to setlist; wax-seal stamp; copper still in dim barn; used sparingly as secondary illustrations
Italian-pop posters scaled down; cardinal-flash + sourwood-honey dominant; high-lonesome-blue as label ground; saturated palette tones throughout
